name: Mills Nicole
body: I continue to think about you guys daily and praying for good results, heck even a miracle that that nightmare would be over for you guys and Lyla. Hugs and prayers for you all.

name: Michael Dawn Anderson
body: Praise the Lord! He is the solid rock on which we all can stand - no matter what! We're praying with you for miracles for Lyla and for your whole family!❤️

name: Graham Geisler
body: Oh, Lee. I can't even imagine how difficult it is for you to sing this hymn, but I am glad God has knit them to your soul. May Jesus bless you and your family - to sustain you in your weariness and comfort you in your fears.

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Thank you for sharing, and the encouragement it gave ME. Praying for Lyla, and each of the rest of you.

name: Andrea VanSchepen
body: Oh you guys … I am just wrecked. Tears are streaming down my face as I am crying out and pleading to God on your behalf. I hate this so much for you guys. I can’t put into words this overwhelming mixture of feelings right now … from intense anger, sadness, helplessness …. to the other hand of full surrender, trust, and hope that God will make a way through this. Your faith and your insane journey in this lifetime … are nothing short of utterly inspiring. I know it’s your faith that is making you able to withstand … but my goodness, Lord Jesus can You please bring about complete healing for this sweet little girl and family? I know He uses aIl things … I don’t doubt in His plans, even though so much of this downright sucks. I just wish this all looked very different for you. Your writing and the lessons He is revealing is incredible and your perspective is unbelievable. Keep writing. Your writing and processing is such a testimony and gift. I love you guys so much. We need to come see and visit you all. Continued prayers, love, and support. I will send this to my prayers warriors also. ❤️

name: Craig and Lisa Dotson
body: Such beautiful words from a loving father and a son of our Father. May the many prayers that are spoken over the four of you continue to bring supernatural strength, comfort and peace.

name: Patty Klopfenstein
body: The song brought tears to my eyes. I remembered when I sang that song in church. We are praying for you and your family. Keep the faith. Love Aunt Patty

name: Sondra Rush
body: I am praying daily for Lyla and your whole family.

name: Renee Runyon
body: I love that song, too, and the truths contained in it just pour out! Thank you for sharing and reminding me of what matters. May God continue to strengthen you through His truth. I am praying for Lyla and you all!
